synopsis: Luke Skywalker is truly a legend, both in our own world and throughout the Star Wars galaxy. The Legends of Luke Skywalker is a collection of the young Jedi’s heroic and selfless acts to inspire greatness and hope in those who witness his deeds. Some of his feats sound so outlandish that you wouldn’t believe it until you see it, and now you can through amazingly beautiful artwork with each story drawn in a different and unique style.
title: The Legends Of Luke Skywalker (Manga)
